══ ROUND 2 ══

→ Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist: CON save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 18 necrotic damage (half).

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:7+9=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
